content_body: My friends and I had so much fun this weekend celebrating a bachelorette party and a birthday here! This cabin is absolutely beautiful, and this is such a great town! Literally the most perfect cabin I have ever stepped in. The waterfall in the shower is AMAZING! Love this place. It is an incredible area. Your cabin is exceptional and the view is nothing short of perfection. Thank you for opening your cabin to us.
title: Exceptional and Nothing Short Of Perfection!
